skills.description: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: This skill contains dual-use security techniques. Before proceeding with any bypass or analysis, verify authorization, document scope, and ensure legal compliance.
trigger_conditions: Analyzing protected binaries with explicit authorization
Conducting malware analysis or security research in scope
Participating in CTFs or approved training exercises
Understanding anti-debugging or obfuscation techniques for defense
anti_triggers: Lack of written authorization or defined scope
Goal is to bypass protections for piracy or misuse
Legal or policy restrictions prohibit analysis

skills.description: Master the complete penetration testing lifecycle from reconnaissance through reporting, covering the five stages of ethical hacking methodology, essential tools, attack techniques, and professional reporting for authorized security assessments.
trigger_conditions: Need to identify and fix vulnerabilities in a system
Want to understand hacker types and their motivations

skills.description: Ensure privacy protections are built into apps from the start using Privacy by Design principles.
trigger_conditions: Building apps that collect personal data
Deploying to production with user data
anti_triggers: Reusing data for purposes not consented to

skills.description: Map identified threats to appropriate security controls and mitigations. Use when prioritizing security investments, creating remediation plans, or validating control effectiveness.
anti_triggers: The task is unrelated to threat mitigation mapping
You need a different domain or tool outside this scope

skills.description: Advanced vulnerability analysis principles, including OWASP 2025, Supply Chain Security, attack surface mapping, and risk prioritization.
trigger_conditions: Applicable to execute the workflow or actions described in the overview.

skills.description: Execute comprehensive network traffic analysis using Wireshark to capture, filter, and examine network packets for security investigations, performance optimization, and troubleshooting.
anti_triggers: No specific anti-triggers mentioned in the file content
